items.title: Kroger CEO flags alarming shift in how customers shop
items.description: People need to eat, but what they eat depends a lot on their budget. Executives from lower-priced chains, including McDonald's and Dollar General, have commented on how they are seeing sales growth with higher-income customers. "We're pleased to see growth once again in our total customer count, ...
